LAW AND MOTION 301,THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANTS JOHNSTONE DOWNEY KLEIN, INC. DBA INTERNATIONAL RISK CONSULTANTS, INCORPORATED AND JEFFREY JANKOWIAK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD A BASIS ON WHICH IT SUCCEEDS TO BCG'S CONTRACT RIGHTS AGAINST DEFENDANT OTHERWISE OVERRULED. MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-16-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING MOTION BY PLAINTIFF CENTER-POINT CAPITAL PARTNERS, INC. TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF JOHNSTONE DOWNEY KLEIN, INC.'S PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 301, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CENTER-POINT CAPITAL PARTNERS INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF JOHNSTONE DOWNEY KLEIN, INCORPORATED'S PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PRODUCE THE WITNESS ON OCTOBER 15, 2010. SANCTIONS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,627.50 BECAUSE DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION LACKED SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE : PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.
